Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The problem is about identifying cases that deviate from a normative process for handling orders based on an event log

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 3 follows the insufficient inventory path up to the Cancel step but then continues with Ship order before Close order That violates the rule that once cancellation happens shipping should never occur The sequence should have stopped at Cancel Close

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 4 is clean Receive Check Cancel Close which 100 matches the insufficient inventory branch

Name: Validation - NE
Text: Case 5 is also clean Receive Check Authorize Ship Close It follows the sufficient inventory path exactly so no violation

Name: Deductive Reasoning - NE
Text: Only Case 2 and Case 3 deviate from the normative process
